---
title: &TITLE Ben Powell
last: Powell
first: Ben
subtitle: "Lecturer in Statistics"
people_group: "academic"
email: "ben.powell@york.ac.uk"
education:
  - Ph.D | University of Durham <br> MMath | University of Durham
description: "Statistician/data scientist/mathematician with interests in both foundations and applications."
image: bpowell_profile_pic_2323_v2.png
page-layout: full
listing:
  - id: pubs
    template: ../../_ejs/publications-people.ejs 
    contents: 
      - "../../../publications/**/*.qmd"
      - "!../../../publications/_template/"
    sort: "pub_number desc"
    # sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [publication, title, categories, image, date, author]
  - id: blogs
    contents: 
      - "../../../posts/**/*.qmd"
    sort: "date desc"
    # sort-ui: true
    filter-ui: true
    include:
      author: *TITLE
    fields: [title, date, description]
about: 
  id: about
  template: solana
  image-shape: rectangle
  image: bpowell_profile_pic_2323_v2.png
  links:
    - icon: envelope
      text: Email
      href: mailto:not_here@gmail.com
---

<hr>

::: {#about}
## Background

{{< meta education >}}
:::

<br>

## Research Interests

My research involves the identification and quantification of patterns in past data that allow us to predict future data. The general strategy is to work with domain experts to solve a problem that interests them. We publish the findings we make and the tools we develop along the way so that other people can use them to solve their own problems.   

## {{< meta first >}}'s blogs

::: {#blogs}
:::


<br>

## {{< meta first >}}'s Group Publications

::: {#pubs}
:::
